bb_bench_press.name: Barbell Bench Press
bb_bench_press.instructions: Lie flat on the bench. Lower the bar to your mid-chest, then press it back up to the starting position.

db_bench_press.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
db_bench_press.instructions: Lie on a flat bench. Press the dumbbells straight up over your chest, then lower them under control.

incline_bb_bench.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
incline_bb_bench.instructions: Set bench to a 30-45 degree incline. Lower the bar to your upper chest, then press back up.

incline_db_bench.name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
incline_db_bench.instructions: Set bench to an incline. Press the dumbbells up over your upper chest, then lower slowly.

decline_bb_bench.name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
decline_bb_bench.instructions: Lie on a decline bench. Lower the bar to your lower chest, then press it back up.

decline_db_bench.name: Decline Dumbbell Bench Press
decline_db_bench.instructions: Lie on a decline bench. Press the dumbbells straight up, then lower them back down.

push_up.name: Push Up
push_up.instructions: Keep your body in a straight line. Lower yourself until your chest is near the floor, then push back up.

cable_crossover.name: Cable Crossover
cable_crossover.instructions: Stand between two high pulleys. Pull the handles down and together in front of your chest.

pec_deck.name: Pec Deck Machine
pec_deck.instructions: Sit at the machine and bring the pads or handles together in front of your chest, squeezing your pecs.

db_fly.name: Dumbbell Fly
db_fly.instructions: Lie on a flat bench. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and lower the weights out to your sides, then bring them back together.

chest_dip.name: Chest Dip
chest_dip.instructions: Lean forward slightly on parallel bars. Lower your body until your shoulders are below your elbows, then push up.

machine_chest_press.name: Machine Chest Press
machine_chest_press.instructions: Sit at the machine and press the handles straight out in front of you.

bb_deadlift.name: Barbell Deadlift
bb_deadlift.instructions: Hinge at the hips and grip the bar. Keep your chest up and back flat as you stand up with the weight.

pull_up.name: Pull Up
pull_up.instructions: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip. Pull your chin over the bar, squeezing your shoulder blades down.

chin_up.name: Chin Up
chin_up.instructions: Hang from a bar with an underhand grip. Pull your chin over the bar.

bb_row.name: Barbell Row
bb_row.instructions: Hinge forward at the hips. Pull the barbell toward your lower chest or belly button, then lower it.

db_row.name: Dumbbell Row
db_row.instructions: Support yourself on a bench. Pull the dumbbell up to your hip, keeping your elbow close to your body.

lat_pulldown.name: Lat Pulldown
lat_pulldown.instructions: Sit at the machine, grip the wide bar, and pull it down to your upper chest.

seated_cable_row.name: Seated Cable Row
seated_cable_row.instructions: Sit at the low pulley station. Keep your back straight and pull the handle to your abdomen.

t_bar_row.name: T-Bar Row
t_bar_row.instructions: Straddle the bar. Hinge at the hips and pull the handles toward your chest.

chest_supported_row.name: Chest-Supported Row
chest_supported_row.instructions: Lie face down on the pad. Pull the handles toward you, squeezing your shoulder blades together.

good_morning.name: Good Morning
good_morning.instructions: Rest the bar on your upper back. Hinge at the hips until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor, then stand up.

hyperextension.name: Hyperextension
hyperextension.instructions: Lock your legs in the hyperextension bench. Lower your torso, then raise it until your body is in a straight line.

straight_arm_pulldown.name: Straight Arm Pulldown
straight_arm_pulldown.instructions: Stand facing the cable. Keep your arms straight and pull the bar down to your thighs.

meadows_row.name: Meadows Row
meadows_row.instructions: Stand perpendicular to a landmine setup. Hinge at the hips and pull the end of the barbell up.

machine_row.name: Machine Row
machine_row.instructions: Sit at the machine with your chest against the pad. Pull the handles back.

rack_pull.name: Rack Pull
rack_pull.instructions: Set the pins in a power rack just below knee height. Stand up with the bar, locking out your hips.

bb_squat.name: Barbell Squat
bb_squat.instructions: Rest the barbell on your upper back. Push your hips back and bend your knees to squat down, then stand back up.

front_squat.name: Front Squat
front_squat.instructions: Rest the barbell across the front of your shoulders. Squat down while keeping your torso upright.

leg_press.name: Leg Press
leg_press.instructions: Sit in the machine and press the platform up. Lower it by bending your knees.

romanian_deadlift.name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
romanian_deadlift.instructions: Keeping your legs relatively straight, push your hips back until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then stand up.

db_lunge.name: Dumbbell Lunge
db_lunge.instructions: Hold dumbbells at your sides. Step forward and lower your hips until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.

bulgarian_split_squat.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
bulgarian_split_squat.instructions: Elevate your rear foot on a bench. Lower your body until your front thigh is parallel to the floor.

goblet_squat.name: Goblet Squat
goblet_squat.instructions: Hold a dumbbell vertically against your chest. Squat down while keeping your chest up.

hack_squat.name: Hack Squat
hack_squat.instructions: Position yourself in the hack squat machine. Lower the sled by bending your knees, then push back up.

leg_extension.name: Leg Extension
leg_extension.instructions: Sit on the machine. Extend your legs straight out, squeeze the quads, and lower under control.

lying_leg_curl.name: Lying Leg Curl
lying_leg_curl.instructions: Lie face down on the machine. Curl the pad up toward your glutes.

seated_leg_curl.name: Seated Leg Curl
seated_leg_curl.instructions: Sit at the machine. Curl the pad downward and back toward your body.

standing_calf_raise.name: Standing Calf Raise
standing_calf_raise.instructions: Stand on the edge of a step or machine pad. Raise your heels as high as possible, then lower them.

seated_calf_raise.name: Seated Calf Raise
seated_calf_raise.instructions: Sit at the machine with pads over your knees. Raise your heels to lift the weight.

glute_bridge.name: Glute Bridge
glute_bridge.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Squeeze your glutes and push your hips toward the ceiling.

bb_hip_thrust.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
bb_hip_thrust.instructions: Rest your upper back on a bench and place a barbell over your hips. Drive your hips up until your body forms a straight line.

sumo_deadlift.name: Sumo Deadlift
sumo_deadlift.instructions: Take a very wide stance. Grip the bar inside your legs. Drive through your heels to stand up.

trap_bar_deadlift.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
trap_bar_deadlift.instructions: Stand inside the trap bar. Squat down to grip the handles, then stand up by extending your hips and knees.

step_up.name: Step Up
step_up.instructions: Hold dumbbells and step up onto a box or bench with one leg. Step back down under control.

cable_pull_through.name: Cable Pull Through
cable_pull_through.instructions: Face away from a low cable pulley. Reach between your legs to grab the rope, then extend your hips forward to stand up.

overhead_press.name: Overhead Press (OHP)
overhead_press.instructions: Stand and press the barbell from your upper chest directly overhead until your arms are fully extended.

db_shoulder_press.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
db_shoulder_press.instructions: Sit on a bench with back support. Press the dumbbells overhead, then lower them to shoulder level.

lateral_raise.name: Lateral Raise
lateral_raise.instructions: Hold dumbbells at your sides. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and raise the weights out to your sides.

front_raise.name: Front Raise
front_raise.instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of your thighs. Raise them straight out in front of you to shoulder height.

face_pull.name: Face Pull
face_pull.instructions: Attach a rope to a high pulley. Pull the rope toward your face, letting your elbows flare outward.

reverse_pec_deck.name: Reverse Pec Deck
reverse_pec_deck.instructions: Sit facing the machine pad. Grasp the handles and pull them backward, squeezing your rear delts.

arnold_press.name: Arnold Press
arnold_press.instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of your face with palms facing you. Press up while rotating your hands so palms face forward at the top.

push_press.name: Push Press
push_press.instructions: Dip your knees slightly and use leg drive to help press the barbell overhead.

upright_row.name: Upright Row
upright_row.instructions: Hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Pull the bar up toward your chin, leading with your elbows.

cable_lateral_raise.name: Cable Lateral Raise
cable_lateral_raise.instructions: Stand next to a low pulley. Pull the handle out and up to your side to shoulder height.

machine_shoulder_press.name: Machine Shoulder Press
machine_shoulder_press.instructions: Sit at the machine and press the handles directly overhead.

seated_bb_press.name: Seated Barbell Press
seated_bb_press.instructions: Sit on a bench with a back support. Press the barbell overhead from your upper chest.

landmine_press.name: Landmine Press
landmine_press.instructions: Hold the end of a landmine barbell at your shoulder. Press it up and forward.

bradford_press.name: Bradford Press
bradford_press.instructions: Press the barbell just over your head and lower it behind your neck, then press it back over to the front.

upright_cable_row.name: Upright Cable Row
upright_cable_row.instructions: Use a straight bar attachment on a low pulley. Pull it upward toward your chin.

bb_curl.name: Barbell Curl
bb_curl.instructions: Hold the barbell with an underhand grip. Keep elbows pinned to your sides and curl the bar up.

db_curl.name: Dumbbell Curl
db_curl.instructions: Hold dumbbells with palms facing forward. Curl the weights up to your shoulders.

hammer_curl.name: Hammer Curl
hammer_curl.instructions: Hold dumbbells with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Curl them up toward your shoulders.

preacher_curl.name: Preacher Curl
preacher_curl.instructions: Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad. Curl the bar up, then lower it fully.

concentration_curl.name: Concentration Curl
concentration_curl.instructions: Sit on a bench, resting your elbow on your inner thigh. Curl the dumbbell up toward your chest.

incline_db_curl.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
incline_db_curl.instructions: Sit on an incline bench with your arms hanging down. Curl the dumbbells up.

cable_curl.name: Cable Curl
cable_curl.instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley. Curl the bar up toward your chest.

spider_curl.name: Spider Curl
spider_curl.instructions: Lie chest-down on an incline bench. Let your arms hang straight down and curl the weight up.

zottman_curl.name: Zottman Curl
zottman_curl.instructions: Curl the dumbbells up with an underhand grip, rotate your wrists at the top, and lower with an overhand grip.

tricep_pushdown.name: Tricep Pushdown
tricep_pushdown.instructions: Keep your elbows at your sides. Push the cable attachment down until your arms are fully extended.

skull_crusher.name: Skull Crusher
skull_crusher.instructions: Lie on a bench. Lower the barbell down toward your forehead by bending your elbows, then press back up.

db_tricep_ext.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
db_tricep_ext.instructions: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands. Lower it behind your head, then extend your arms back up.

tricep_dip.name: Tricep Dip
tricep_dip.instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars or a bench. Keep your torso upright and lower your body, then push back up.

close_grip_bench.name: Close Grip Bench Press
close_grip_bench.instructions: Lie on a bench and grip the bar roughly shoulder-width apart. Lower to your chest and press up, keeping elbows tucked.

db_kickback.name: Dumbbell Kickback
db_kickback.instructions: Bend over and keep your upper arm parallel to the floor. Extend your arm backward until it is straight.

cable_overhead_ext.name: Cable Overhead Extension
cable_overhead_ext.instructions: Face away from a high or low pulley. Pull the rope attachment over your head and extend your arms.

jm_press.name: JM Press
jm_press.instructions: A hybrid between a close-grip bench press and a skull crusher. Lower the bar toward your upper chest/neck and press up.

machine_tricep_ext.name: Machine Tricep Extension
machine_tricep_ext.instructions: Sit at the machine, grasp the handles, and push down or out to extend your arms.

tate_press.name: Tate Press
tate_press.instructions: Lie on a bench with dumbbells over your chest. Flare your elbows and lower the inner edges of the dumbbells to your chest.

crunch.name: Crunch
crunch.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Contract your abs to lift your shoulder blades off the floor.

plank.name: Plank
plank.instructions: Hold a push-up position resting on your forearms. Keep your body in a straight line and brace your core.

hanging_leg_raise.name: Hanging Leg Raise
hanging_leg_raise.instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar. Keep your legs straight or knees bent, and raise them until they are parallel to the floor.

cable_crunch.name: Cable Crunch
cable_crunch.instructions: Kneel below a high pulley with a rope attachment. Curl your torso downward toward your knees.

russian_twist.name: Russian Twist
russian_twist.instructions: Sit on the floor, lean back slightly, and lift your feet. Twist your torso from side to side.

ab_wheel_rollout.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
ab_wheel_rollout.instructions: Kneel on the floor holding an ab wheel. Roll it out in front of you until your body is fully extended, then pull back.

bicycle_crunch.name: Bicycle Crunch
bicycle_crunch.instructions: Lie on your back. Bring your left elbow to your right knee while extending your left leg, then alternate sides.

v_up.name: V-Up
v_up.instructions: Lie flat on your back. Simultaneously lift your legs and your torso, reaching your hands toward your toes.

side_plank.name: Side Plank
side_plank.instructions: Lie on your side. Prop yourself up on one forearm and the side of your foot, keeping your body in a straight line.

reverse_crunch.name: Reverse Crunch
reverse_crunch.instructions: Lie on your back. Bring your knees toward your chest, lifting your hips off the floor, then lower them slowly.

kettlebell_swing.name: Kettlebell Swing
kettlebell_swing.instructions: Hinge at the hips and swing the kettlebell between your legs, then thrust your hips forward to swing it up.

burpee.name: Burpee
burpee.instructions: Drop into a squat, kick your feet back into a plank, perform a push-up, jump your feet back in, and jump up.

clean_and_jerk.name: Clean and Jerk
clean_and_jerk.instructions: Explosively pull the barbell from the floor to your shoulders (clean), then drive it overhead (jerk).

snatch.name: Snatch
snatch.instructions: Use a wide grip and explosively lift the barbell from the floor directly to an overhead locked-out position.

power_clean.name: Power Clean
power_clean.instructions: Explosively pull the barbell from the floor or hang position and catch it on your front deltoids in a partial squat.

treadmill_run.name: Treadmill Running
treadmill_run.instructions: Run at a steady pace or do intervals on a treadmill.

rowing_machine.name: Rowing Machine
rowing_machine.instructions: Drive with your legs, then pull with your back and arms to complete the rowing stroke.

stair_climber.name: Stair Climber
stair_climber.instructions: Step up continuously on the revolving staircase.

stationary_bike.name: Stationary Bike
stationary_bike.instructions: Pedal at a consistent cadence or use varying resistance levels.

elliptical.name: Elliptical
elliptical.instructions: Stand on the pedals and grab the handles, moving your arms and legs in a fluid, elliptical motion.
